AF_LF_3103219 的 SQL 查询块 | SQL=select exchange_type,stock_code,current_amount,imp_flag from ( select a.exchange_type as exchange_type, a.stock_code... | actions=手工打包体, 查询SQL语句开始, 查询SQL语句结束 | targets=@exchange_type_t,@stock_code_t,@current_amount,@imp_flag_t, select exchange_type,stock_code,current_amount,imp_flag
                  from (
                     select a.exchange_type as exchange_type,
                            a.stock_code as stock_code,
                            (a.current_amount + a.correct_amount + a.real_buy_amount - a.real_sell_amount) as current_amount,
                            '0' as imp_flag
                       from uses_stock_real a
                      where (trim(@exchange_type_tmp) = '' or a.exchange_type = @exchange_type_tmp)
                        and a.stock_code not in ('131990', '131991', '888880')
                        and a.money_type = @money_type
                        and (trim(@stock_account_tmp) = '' or a.stock_account = @stock_account_tmp)
                        and a.fund_account = @fund_account
                  union all
                     select b.exchange_type as exchange_type,
                            b.stock_code as stock_code,
                            nvl(sum(case b.entrust_bs
                                         when '2' then b.business_amount
                                         else -1*b.business_amount end)  ,0.00) as current_amount,
                            '0' as imp_flag
                       from secu_unfinished b
                      where (trim(@exchange_type_tmp) = '' or b.exchange_type = @exchange_type_tmp)
                        and init_date <> @sys_init_date
                        and b.fund_account = @fund_account
                        and (trim(@stock_account_tmp) = '' or b.stock_account = @stock_account_tmp)
                        and b.unfinished_type = '0'
                        and b.deli_status = '0'
                   group by b.exchange_type, b.stock_code
                  union all
                     select c.exchange_type as exchange_type,
                            c.stock_code as stock_code,
                            nvl(sum(case c.entrust_bs when '2' then c.business_amount
                                                      else 0 - c.business_amount end), 0.00) as current_amount,
                            '0' as imp_flag
                       from uses_entrust c
                      where (trim(@exchange_type_tmp) = '' or c.exchange_type = @exchange_type_tmp)
                        and (trim(@stock_account_tmp) = '' or c.stock_account = @stock_account_tmp)
                        and c.fund_account = @fund_account
                        and c.entrust_status in ('4', '5', '7', '8')
                        and c.entrust_prop = '4'
                        and c.entrust_type = '0'
                   group by c.exchange_type, c.stock_code
                  union all
                     select d.exchange_type as exchange_type,
                            d.stock_code as stock_code,
                            (d.store_amount + d.pre_in_amount) as current_amount,
                            '1' as imp_flag
                       from impawn_stock d
                      where (trim(@exchange_type_tmp) = '' or d.exchange_type = @exchange_type_tmp)
                        and (trim(@stock_account_tmp) = '' or d.stock_account = @stock_account_tmp) 
                        and d.fund_account = @fund_account
                  union all
                     select e.exchange_type as exchange_type,
                            e.stock_code as stock_code,
                            sum(-1 * e.entrust_amount) as current_amount,
                            '0' as imp_flag
                       from uses_entrust e
                      where (trim(@exchange_type_tmp) = '' or e.exchange_type = @exchange_type_tmp)
                        and (trim(@stock_account_tmp) = '' or e.stock_account = @stock_account_tmp)
                        and e.fund_account = @fund_account
                        and e.entrust_prop = 'f'
                        and e.entrust_bs = '1'
                        and e.entrust_type = '0'
                        and e.entrust_status = '8'
                   group by e.exchange_type, e.stock_code
                       )
